description: The main objective of this pipeline is to copy physical pixel sizes from a source image to a target image and then export the result. The pipeline starts with the node '9575416b-3eaa-4136-8c82-3f478905bc9c' and ends with the node '0333971d-7f94-4a16-876e-2edc9bf92555'. It takes two input images, copies physical pixel sizes using '9575416b-3eaa-4136-8c82-3f478905bc9c', and then exports the result.

9575416b-3eaa-4136-8c82-3f478905bc9c.name: ij1-calibration-copy-physical-dimensions
9575416b-3eaa-4136-8c82-3f478905bc9c.description:
Copies the phyiscal pixel sizes from the source to the target

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

0333971d-7f94-4a16-876e-2edc9bf92555.name: iji-export-image-v2
0333971d-7f94-4a16-876e-2edc9bf92555.description:
Exports incoming images into a non-JIPipe format (PNG, JPEG, BMP, AVI, TIFF). Please note support for input images depending on the file format:
  • PNG, JPEG, BMP: 2D images only
  • AVI: 2D or 3D images only
  • TIFF: All images supported


This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
